Transcrição Completa: 13 PR Services

 

[00:00] So you guys are ready to sell some PR services. Now depending on who you know depends on what level of PR that you can sell.

 

[00:08] Uh if you don't have any connections, just make sure you leverage the existing community and go in and ask, "Hey, can anybody post on this specific channel?"

 

[00:17] Uh in this video example, I'm going to act like I don't have any connections at all and I just simply want to upsell on top of the services that I can find on fiverr.com.

 

[00:27] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Fiverr.com - Search Interface

 

NÚMEROS: $20-$100 range por serviço

 

VISUAL: Tela de busca do Fiverr mostrando campo de pesquisa com termos "NBC" e "CBS", interface web com múltiplos resultados de prestadores de serviço

 

[00:29] So, as an example, if I go to Fiverr and I type in NBC or uh CBS or uh really anything, if I could type it in correctly, what I'm going to find are all these different people between 20 and 100 bucks that sell a PR service.

 

[00:43] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Fiverr Search Results - PR Services Listings

 

NÚMEROS: $20-$100

 

VISUAL: Grid de resultados do Fiverr mostrando múltiplos perfis de vendedores, fotos de perfil, títulos de serviços, preços variados, estrelas de avaliação

 

[00:47] Now, the differences between these services uh really just depend on which channels you're going to be posting on and how many words they're going to include in the articles that are being written for you or for the client that you're representing.

 

[00:59] They're really quite simple. They write the article, they distribute the article, and it takes less than 3 to 5 days in most cases. Some of them you're going to get between eight and 10 days, but still that's an incredible that's incredible service for 20 to 100 bucks.

[01:15] So, this lady right here, uh, she looks pretty great. 57 reviews, 4.9 stars, and she posts on Fox, CBS, ABC, and NBC News.

[01:36] So, this one goes to 200 different websites. That's pretty cool. I've also seen some of them that do up to 550. So, maybe I want to use one of those as well.

[01:57] I get an NBC, CBS, Fox, ABC, and MSNBC. In addition to that, it only takes three days. Uh, I can shrink it down to two days if I want for an extra 20 bucks.

 

[02:07] And on top of that, I get 600 different words that are included in the article, completely written by them.

[03:27] And you are a surgeon, so you likely have a very high ticket cost. I see that you're doing everything uh from plastic surgery, you know, face facial reconstructions, breast implants, butt lifts. You're doing all kinds of cool stuff uh to help the planet where you're at.

 

[03:42] So, I want to make sure that I can help you get more leads, more sales, and just a better reputation online.

[04:01] So, there's a few things that we can do here. Number one, uh I want to help you with press. I want to help you get inside of platforms like NBC, CBS, ABC, Fox, MSNBC.

[04:26] And we help recommend uh some images that'll be picked up by more channels. On average, we'll get between about 300 to 400 different channels that are going to pick up this specific article.

[04:39] And the cool part about that, I don't know if you're familiar with the search engines and how they work, but you know, about 10 to 20 of those different articles that get published out of the three to 400 in total will actually rank in the search engines.

 

[04:50] It might not be right away. It might take two to three months, sometimes a little longer, but nonetheless, uh, you can also drive traffic to these things on Facebook.

It builds credibility and it just overall will help with the reputation and driving more people into your business, driving more leads into your business.

[07:36] Such a simple service to offer and it requires almost no work on your end besides a conversation uh and your ability to duplicate what the person wants effectively into an article.

[08:05] And with the Excel sheet, you heard me talk about that in the reporting side of it. That's what comes in these different Fiverr services. They give you this long Excel sheet of all these things and then they also give you that image that says as seen on all the different channels that they were seen on.

 

[08:20] So really effective, uh really cheap for you to be able to do and really easy for you to upsell on top of. I'll see you guys in the next video.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Serviços de PR no Fiverr: $20-$100

Vendedor selecionado: 57 reviews, 4.9 estrelas

Custo base do serviço: $60 (opção de $80 com express)

550 canais de distribuição garantidos

200-550 websites dependendo do pacote

600 palavras por artigo (≈3 parágrafos)

3 dias de entrega padrão (2 dias com +$20)

300-400 canais pegam o artigo em média

10-20 artigos ranqueiam organicamente nos buscadores

2-3 meses para ranking SEO

Preço de venda: $1,500 (one-time)

Custo real: $100

Margem de lucro: 90% (antes de impostos)

Lucro bruto: $1,400 por venda

Prazo total prometido ao cliente: 10 dias

Time de vendas mencionado: 11 salespeople

Caso exemplo: Dr. Tim (1.3 estrelas, 3 reviews, cirurgião plástico Miami)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Sourcing de Serviços: Usar Fiverr.com como fornecedor backend ($60-$100)

Prospecção: Buscar no Google profissionais com alto ranking mas reputação ruim

Identificação de Prospects Ideais: Alto ranking SEO + baixas avaliações = oportunidade

Pitch em Vídeo: 2-3 minutos de duração, personalizado

Underpromise/Overdeliver: Prometer 300-400 canais quando garantido são 550+

Upsell Progressivo: PR primeiro → depois ads locais → gestão de reviews

Estrutura do Pitch:

Identificar problema específico (ranking vs reputação)

Apresentar solução (PR em grandes redes)

Quantificar benefícios (canais, SEO, credibilidade)

Ancoragem de preço ($1,500 one-time)

Plantar seeds para serviços futuros

Estratégia de Credibilidade: Usar logos "As Featured In" para conversão

Minimal Work Model: Apenas conversa + passar informações para Fiverr

 

ESTRUTURA:

Canais de Mídia Principal: NBC, CBS, ABC, Fox, MSNBC (nível local)

Processo de Entrega (10 dias):

Sessão de estratégia com cliente (Day 1)

Seleção de imagem otimizada para distribuição

Escrita do artigo 600 palavras/3 parágrafos (Days 1-3)

Distribuição para 550+ canais (Days 4-7)

Compilação de relatório Excel (Days 8-9)

Entrega final com todos assets (Day 10)

Entregáveis Finais:

Artigo publicado em 300-400 canais ativos

Excel sheet com nome de cada canal + link direto

Logos "As Seen On" customizados (uso ilimitado)

10-20 artigos ranqueando organicamente (2-3 meses)

Potencial de tráfego via Facebook ads

Framework de Vendas:

Problema → Solução → Benefícios → Preço → Upsell futuro

Foco em high-ticket clients (cirurgiões, advogados, etc.)

Leverage de comunidade existente para conexões de mídia

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Investimento por Venda: $100 (serviço Fiverr premium)

Preço de Venda: $1,500 (one-time payment)

Lucro Bruto por Venda: $1,400

Margem de Lucro: 90%+ (antes de impostos)

ROI: 1,400% sobre investimento

Tempo de Trabalho: 2-3 minutos (pitch) + 1 conversa estratégica

Escalabilidade: Ilimitada (modelo Fiverr backend)

Ticket Médio Target: High-ticket professionals (cirurgiões, advogados)

Potencial de Upsell:

Advertising local (valor não especificado)

Gestão de reviews Google (valor não especificado)

Serviços contínuos de credibilidade

Histórico de Performance: Vendido com sucesso por time de 11 vendedores

Break-even: Após 1ª venda (custo de aquisição não mencionado)

 

DURAÇÃO: 8:30 minutos FORMATO: Screencast tutorial com role-play de pitch em vídeo ao vivo
